rows.item: Confirm the attended review packet is limited to public-source citations and reversible draft review.
acceptance_criteria: Every row cites public plan evidence or source evidence.
The row describes review readiness only and does not claim a live DevHub result.
rollback_verification: Reviewer confirms no official record change is represented by this row.
Reviewer confirms any draft-only work can be discarded without affecting DevHub.

rows.item: Confirm consequential actions remain blocked until user attendance and exact action confirmation.
rows.acceptance_criteria: Checklist language only permits preflight review, manual handoff, and reversible draft planning.
rows.rollback_verification: No-side-effect review only; no portal operation is represented as complete.
